PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRIGSBY, SIMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, THANH LIEM NGUYEN, LAM SON $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT
